description_long: This object is a rectangular gravestone or headstone, typically found in a cemetery or graveyard. It features a broad, upright slab mounted on a two-tiered rectangular base, all constructed from a smooth, light gray stone material. The front face of the upright slab has a recessed rectangular plaque area, bordered by visible bolts or fasteners, which is likely intended for inscriptions or memorial information. The sides and back of the object are plain, with clean, sharp edges and no visible ornamentation or engravings. The overall design is simple and modern, with a focus on geometric lines and symmetry. The surface appears to be polished, giving it a slightly reflective quality.
description: A modern, rectangular gravestone with a smooth light gray finish, featuring a recessed plaque area on the front and a two-tiered base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed plaque area with visible bolts on the upright slab.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the upright slab and the stepped base, with no visible plaque or ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, smooth surface with no plaque or inscriptions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the thickness and clean lines of the structure.
